title: ilex crenata f. latifolia
intro: Ilex crenata f. latifolia, also known as the 'Holly Fernleaf', is a cultivar of the Japanese Holly (Ilex crenata) and is characterized by its broad, glossy leaves. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Ilex crenata f. latifolia include its ability to support immune function, improve circulation, and reduce oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or decoctions, which can be consumed as teas or used as a base for topical applications.
